youtube_items.summary: Welcome to our Freeman Spogli Institute panel on Global Trends and Geopolitics in 2026:   A Look Ahead. This is the first in a new  quarterly series that we'll be doing here at FSI   that will hold seminars, panel  discussions like this on the state of the world,   given that we can expect that every quarter  the world will be quite different from the quarter   before. For those of you who don't know me,  my name is Colin Kahl. As of six weeks   ago I am the director of the Freeman Spogli   Institute for International Studies here at   Stanford. I'm also the Steven C. Házy Senior  Fellow at FSI. For those of you who are   new to FSI, we are the university's premier hub  for interdiscipl

youtube_items.summary: 10 ट्रेंड्स आर टेकिंग प्लेस इन ग्लोबल पॉलिटिक्स 2026 जिनको वन बाय वन जो है डिकोड करने वाले हैं। फ्रेंड्स जिसके अंदर हम मल्टी फैसिटेड चीजों को ऐड करने वाले हैं। आप यह समझ लें कि आपको रीजनल लेवल के ऊपर और ग्लोबल लेवल के ऊपर एक कंप्लीट ओवरव्यू मिलने वाला है दोस्तों। वीडियो को लास्ट तक लाजमी देखिएगा। आपके लिए बहुत ज्यादा हेल्पफुल होने वाली है। दोस्तों जो आज हमारी डिस्कशन रहने वाली है बेसिकली यह है कि ग्लोबल पॉलिटिक्स 2026 के अंदर कैसे रहने वाली है? इसके अंदर ऐसे कौन से ट्रेंड्स हमें देखने को मिल सकते हैं। और वो ट्रेंड्स जो हमने यहां पर निकाले हैं आपके लिए वह 10 ट्रेंड्स हमें देखने को मिल रहे हैं फ्रेंड्स। और बाकी भी अगर कोई ट्रेंड्स हैं तो वह सारे इसके साथ इंटरकनेक्टेड हैं और उनको भी हम ऐड करते जाएंगे। यहां पर आप यह समझ लें कि हमारे पास एक टॉपिक है तो उसको हम फैक्ट्स एंड फिगर के साथ यहां पर डि

raw_items.title: Daily Press Briefing by the Office of the Spokesperson for the Secretary-General
raw_items.summary: Today is the International Day for the Elimination of Sexual Violence in Conflict. Sexual violence against children is one of the six grave violations against children identified and condemned by the Security Council. Ending this abomination, the Secretary-General says, requires protection, accountability and prevention.

raw_items.title: With Fundamental Freedoms under Assault, Work of Human Rights Council ‘More Vital Than Ever’, Secretary-General Says in Anniversary Video Message
raw_items.summary: Following is the text of UN Secretary-General António Guterres’ video message to the informal high-level discussion on the occasion of the twentieth anniversary of the Human Rights Council, in Geneva today:

raw_items.title: Meeting of States Parties to United Nations Convention on Law of Sea, United Nations Headquarters, 15-18 June
raw_items.summary: The thirty-sixth Meeting of States Parties to the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea was held at Headquarters from 15 to 18 June.

raw_items.title: Despite Ceasefire Gains, Gazans Trapped in Humanitarian Nightmare, Briefers Warn, as Security Council Speakers Demand Unhindered Aid Access, Respect for Peace Plan
raw_items.summary: While a limited ceasefire has improved life in Gaza somewhat, millions of its residents still face tremendous daily difficulties, the Security Council heard today, as speakers underscored the need to provide immediate humanitarian help to a population that can ill afford to wait.

raw_items.title: Orban’s Defeat Is Being Dangerously Misread
raw_items.summary: Panicking strongmen will turn to more extreme measures.

raw_items.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue strikes despite ceasefire agreement
raw_items.summary: Several people are reported killed in southern Lebanon, with the IDF saying it hit "Hezbollah terrorist targets" after the group fired over 50 projectiles at Israeli forces.

raw_items.title: Zelensky stripped of highest Polish honour over WW2 name of army unit
